title: No warmup phase — measurement includes cold-start artifacts
violated_rule: Warmup period excluded — measurement starts after warmup
expected_feedback: Critical: no warmup phase. First 30s includes JVM startup, connection pool creation, cache cold starts. p99 inflated by 5-10x. Add a separate warmup scenario with tags: {phase: 'warmup'} and filter thresholds to {phase:test} only.
